basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Post Doctoral Fellow Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Assistant Professor- Law and Public Policy & Post Doctoral Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official TISS website. The last date to submit the application form is 10-05-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Below 35 years for Post Doctoral Fellow with relaxation for reserved categories.
age_limit.details: Post Doctoral Fellow: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/Women/PWD (Persons with Disabilities) and Transgender candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in Law and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. for Assistant Professor. Ph.D. degree in Law/ Law and Economics/ Law and Public Policy or similar for Post Doctoral Fellow.
qualification.details: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in law from a recognised university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET, or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Ph.D. degree obtained from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among the top 500 in the World University Ranking (at any time) by QS, THE or ARWU. Desirable: Interdisciplinary academic background or training, teaching experience at undergraduate and/or postgraduate levels, record of scholarly research, professional or field experience. | Ph.D. degree in Law/ Law and Economics/ Law and Public Policy/Any other interdisciplinary discipline with explicit focus on Law, Legislative and Legal aspects of Public Policy (Provisional Certificate may be accepted in case the degree is not awarded). Desirable: Demonstrated research interest at the intersection of law and public policy, strong grounding in public law, regulatory law, or policy analysis, evidence of quality research output, familiarity with interdisciplinary research methods, willingness to undertake academic coordination or programme administration, ability to work collaboratively.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor in Law and Public Policy

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Professors: Rs. 57700/- (Entry pay). Post Doctoral Fellowship: Rs. 80,000 consolidated.
salary_details.details: Assistant Professors: Rs. 57700/- (Entry pay of Rs. 57700/- in the Academic Pay level 10 as per 7th CPC). Post Doctoral Fellowship: Rs. 80,000 consolidated with annual increment (if extended after one year) as per the Institute's norms.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the TISS Assistant Professor and Post Doctoral Fellow positions is 10 May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Professor position, candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in Law and have cleared NET/SLET/SET or hold a Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Post Doctoral Fellow position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these TISS posts?
faq.answer: Assistant Professors will receive an entry pay of Rs. 57700/-. Post Doctoral Fellows will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official TISS website. The application process involves filling out the online form, uploading necessary documents, and submitting it before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for these positions. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will include an online interview followed by a verification of documents to assess the candidates' suitability.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Assistant Professor and Post Doctoral Fellow at TISS are offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from across India apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the TISS recruitment is open to candidates from across India, with the institute located in Mumbai.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
